Video.summary: Plaintiff, Reprudentia, is suing a fellow Cameroonian countryman for the $5000 she gave him to buy her a car.
Video.title: Car Troubles

Video.summary: Accusations of cheating mixed with short tempers is a recipe for disaster in D’Mitry and Jessica’s relationship.
Video.title: Hartfield vs. Saunders

Video.summary: The claws come out when two sisters slug it out. When the bombshells drop the emotions fly.
Video.title: Sisters Slug it Out

Video.summary: After years of ups and downs, the result of a DNA test will make or break a long-distance relationship.
Video.title: Webb vs. Jackson

Video.summary: Nelson is here to sue his sister who has battled a heroin addiction for two unpaid loans.
Video.title: Seeking Treatment for Heroin

Video.summary: A woman sues her boyfriend after he tore her dress saying it was too revealing.
Video.title: Edmonds vs. Steele

Video.summary: Olivia is suing her best friend's daughter over a utility bill but Kalia wants nothing to do with her.
Video.title: Someone’s Full of Hot Air

Video.summary: A battle over co-parenting takes a twist as Rico pushes for a second chance, but Alyssa intends to stand firm.
Video.title: Lopez vs. Widmer

Video.summary: With help from a substance abuse expert, the judges coach Nohariz and Eli through marital issues and alcohol abuse.
Video.title: Gonzalez vs. Rodriguez

Video.summary: Sexual frustrations and a gambling addiction threaten Drew and Aubrey's 16-year relationship as they battle for reconciliation.
Video.title: York-Ketner vs. Ketner

Video.summary: Dawn wants her unpaid wages. Stegen says the organizers didn't pay him so he wasn't obligated to pay her.
Video.title: The Exotic Erotic Ball

Video.summary: The SED act on a felony warrant. Deputy Miller breaks up an underage party in the woods.
Video.title: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Image.alt: Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!
Smile, You're on My Surveillance System!

Video.summary: SWAT carries out a mission to arrest a man wanted for assault with a deadly weapon.
Video.title: SWAT vs. Dirty Harry

Video.summary: A polygraph test determines the fate of a rocky relationship when Bernard and Lexus both accuse the other of cheating.
Video.title: O'Neal vs Antrom

Video.summary: A Georgia couple seek advice from the judges after struggling with nitpicking, job loss and starting a family.
Video.title: King vs. McFee

Video.summary: A woman accuses her boyfriend of being an inconvenience and a drunk, but a shocking reveal could turn the whole case on its head.
Video.title: Braddy vs. Scott

Video.summary: A dramatic dispute over infidelity, fatherhood and responsibility puts a fragile relationship to the ultimate test.
Video.title: Cobb vs. Harper

Video.summary: An Arkansas woman accuses her husband of being addicted to pornography.
Video.title: Holmes vs. Holmes

Video.summary: Exes squabble in court over who’s to blame for their failed relationship.
Video.title: Johnson vs. Fletcher

Video.summary: Imani and LaBron face a high-stakes compatibility test to determine if their love and family can survive.
Video.title: Gordon vs. Watson

Video.summary: Deputy Payne shows us a typical day for the life of a deputy in El Dorado County.
Video.title: All in A Night's Patrol

Video.summary: A couple get into an argument after Deputy Katz makes a felony arrest. Deputy Dacanay responds to a man attempting to break into a neighbor's home with a shovel.
Video.title: Unhappy Wife, Unhappy Life

Video.summary: Deputy Carpenter investigates a marijuana grow and home theft. Deputy Bradley responds to an abusive alcoholic mother.
Video.title: Follow the Water

Video.summary: Deputies Payne and Miller apprehend a burglar under the influence at an animal hospital. The SED conducts a probation check on a known flop house.
Video.title: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Image.alt: I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes
I Broke into the Vet's Office to Get a Pack of Cigarettes

Video.summary: A dangerous fugitive is wanted for assult and battery. A deputy stops and unregistrered vehicle. A look at the daily procedures deputies must follow before going on patrol.
Video.title: The Man in the Van

Video.summary: Deputy Braafladt evacuates homeowners during the Sand Fire.
Video.title: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Image.alt: Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!
Fire is Coming, Time to Run!

Video.summary: Deputy Brady searches for a man wanted for felonious assault and domestic violence.
Video.title: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Image.alt: You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide
You Can Run but You Can Not Hide

Video.summary: Deputies respond to an ongoing fight between drug users in Pollock Pines. A business owner claims she is being harassed and victimized.
Video.title: Meth Freaks Abound

Video.summary: Delvon's suing for wifi costs and alienation of affection. Tedmenia says she's just chatting online!
Video.title: Anti-Social Network

Video.summary: Sarah is suing her former friend for the bail money that she posted for him.
Video.title: Bail Bonds Break Bonds

Video.summary: Herve Ambwa is accusing his counsin of selling his beloved Wii gaming console Irvin swears he would never do such a thing and that is was stolen due to his roommates negligence.
Video.title: What Happened to the Wii?

Video.summary: Candace is suing a used car salesman for a car she never kept. He claims that he offered her 15 cars.
Video.title: When Life Gives You A Lemon

Image.alt: When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon
When Life Gives You A Lemon

Video.summary: Two siblings go toe to toe and tell different stories. Reuinted after years apart, the battle begins again.
Video.title: He Said She Said

Video.summary: Jill is suing Laura after failing to repay a loan, but Laura says it was a gift.
Video.title: Livid Over a Loan

Video.summary: Wilda is suing her neighbor for the cost of stolen speakers and $3,000 for harassment.
Video.title: Judge And Defendant Go Head To Head

Image.alt: Judge And Defendant Go Head To Head
Judge And Defendant Go Head To Head
Judge And Defendant Go Head To Head

Video.summary: Vanessa is suing her former roommates for kicking her out and leaving her homeless.
Video.title: Rotten Renter

Video.summary: Hasani and Toni say they bought a very large speaker from the defendant, Armando, with the understanding they’d get their money. Back if they couldn’t find a truck to transport it - which ended up happening. They claim the Armando gave them some cockamamie story that a man showed up to pick it up for them. Armando says the plaintiffs said they’d be sending someone to pick it up. That same day a tall guy came with the same receipt and picked up the speaker. Then he gets a call from the bank saying the charge is being disputed. He claims this is an absurd shakedown and he is accused of making a lot of noise.
Video.title: Making a Lot of Noise

Video.summary: Jeretha is petitioning the court for a DNA test to be given to a woman she thinks is her sister.
Video.title: From Strangers to Sisters

Video.summary: Jorge brings his wife to court for damaged property after constantly accusing him of cheating.
Video.title: Done with the Accusations

Video.summary: Linda claims her daughter is lying about her being a bad mother, so she's suing for defamation.
Video.title: A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’

Image.alt: A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’
A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’
A Daughter Trying to Break a ‘Generational Curse’

Video.summary: A mother claims her son punched her in the face three times after getting into an argument and then put her in a choke hold; her son claims he was only acting in self-defense.
Video.title: Punch Happy

Video.summary: Christopher is sued by his mother for parking tickets after being unable to forgive her for choosing drugs.
Video.title: Parking Tickets and Past Troubles

Video.summary: A man says he dated the defendant for 20 years, and they have a child together, but now that he's married, the defendant has become extremely jealous of his new relationship; he sues for breach of contract, an electric bill and emotional distress.
Video.title: Love, Lies, and Legal Ties

Video.summary: California Parole Agents seek a violent fugitive. A wife harbors her fugitive husband in Colorado.
Video.title: On The Run

Video.summary: A predator tries to hide by not answering his door. A pregnant parolee stops reporting to her supervisor.
Video.title: No Door Unanswered

Video.summary: Two neighboring houses filled with parolees are surrounded and searched.
Video.title: Violation Visit

Video.summary: Parole Agents are extra careful while finding a gang member. A parolee tries to hide his weapon from agents.
Video.title: Armed and Dangerous

Video.summary: Agents can't find a parolee at his house but find contraband. Agents discover a woman with a warrant hiding.
Video.title: Finding Contraband
